title: Add Notifications/Admin view and remove Tempo Traveller option

requirements.summary: Add an in-app Notifications/Admin view to list incoming bookings with loading/empty states and manual refresh, and add a header entry point to open it.
acceptanceCriteria: A new UI entry point exists in the header (or a clearly visible section link) that opens a Notifications/Admin view without leaving the app.
The Notifications/Admin view fetches bookings from the backend and renders them in a readable list/table with: reference ID, name, phone, and formatted timestamp.
The view shows a loading indicator while fetching, an empty state message when there are no bookings, and a 'Refresh' control that refetches the list on demand.
Bookings are displayed in reverse chronological order (newest first).

file_operations.description: Create a Notifications/Admin view component that renders bookings (reference ID, customer name, customer phone, formatted timestamp) in a readable list/table with loading state, empty state, and a Refresh action. Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card/Button and, if available, Table) to keep styling consistent; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add a react-query hook that uses the actor to fetch bookings via the backend function that returns [referenceId, booking] pairs already sorted newest-first; expose query state (data/loading/error) and a refetch method for manual refresh.

Update/extend existing query hooks to align with the current backend interface (including the method that returns bookings with reference IDs sorted newest-first) and to avoid calling non-existent booking fetch functions.

Wire the Notifications/Admin view into the app without navigation away (e.g., toggle a view/state or render it conditionally) and add a clearly visible header entry point to open/close it. Use shadcn-ui Button for the entry point to match existing UI; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Remove Tempo Traveller from the vehicle/pricing section and from booking flow car type selection; update any remaining UI text referencing it.
acceptanceCriteria: The Tempo Traveller card is removed from `frontend/src/components/VehiclePricingSection.tsx` so only Sedan and SUV are shown.
The Tempo Traveller option is removed from the 'Car Type' select in `frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx` so it cannot be selected.
If any existing UI text references 'tempo traveller' (e.g., image alt text in the vehicle section), it is updated to match the remaining vehicle options.

file_operations.description: Remove the Tempo Traveller entry from the vehicles list, adjust the grid/layout as needed for two vehicle cards, and update any copy/alt text to reference only Sedan and SUV.
Remove the Tempo Traveller option from the 'Car Type' Select so users can only choose Sedan or SUV, and ensure default/validation behavior remains correct.

requirements.summary: Replace the vehicle/pricing section fleet image with an updated generated asset that no longer shows a Tempo Traveller and update the component to reference the new filename.
acceptanceCriteria: A new generated static image exists under `frontend/public/assets/generated` that visually matches the current style but includes only Sedan and SUV.
`frontend/src/components/VehiclePricingSection.tsx` references the updated image filename, and the rendered image no longer depicts a Tempo Traveller.

file_operations.description: Add the updated generated static image asset (edit of the existing vehicle-set) that visually matches current style but includes only Sedan and SUV: frontend/public/assets/generated/vehicle-set-no-tempo.dim_1200x400.png.
Update the vehicle set image reference to use frontend/public/assets/generated/vehicle-set-no-tempo.dim_1200x400.png and ensure accompanying alt text matches Sedan and SUV only.
